HGSS.666.0001:
Hey, can I get your number?
I’ll ring you up to battle. [0200,0000]
HGSS.666.0002:
I’ll ring you whenever I get the urge
to battle!
HGSS.666.0003:
Oh, all right...
But I won’t lose to you again!
HGSS.666.0004:
Can I get your phone number?\f
I don’t want to lose against you!
We have to battle again, OK? [0200,0000]
HGSS.666.0005:
And yet another loss...
No doubt about it--you’re tough.\f
Being beaten this often actually feels
good now!\f
Here, take this.
Use it to get even tougher. That will\r
toughen me up, too!\f
HGSS.666.0006:
Hey, you’re nearby, aren’t you? What’s
with the phone call? Come talk to me!
HGSS.666.0007:
Hey, do you remember my super-cool
[0100,000A,0000]?\f
My [0100,000A,0000] is different from
regular [0100,000A,0000].\f
It’s like my [0100,000A,0000] is in the top
percentage of [0100,000A,0000].\f
Do you know what I’m saying?
HGSS.666.0008:
Oh yeah, I took down a [0100,000B,0000]
in the wild the other day.\f
It was a cakewalk. Well, I guess it
can’t be helped, us being so tough.\f
All right. Later!
HGSS.666.0009:
Oh yeah, I saw a wild [0100,000B,0000]!
I thought about going for it, but\r
then I failed!\f
Oh well. I guess that’s just the way
it goes. I’m not very good at catching\r
Pokémon...
HGSS.666.0010:
Let’s get together and battle!
I promise things will be different!\f
[0104,0003,0000]’s where I’ll be.
Give me a shout when you come.\f
All right. Later!
HGSS.666.0011:
What’s keeping you, [0103,0000,0000]?\f
Let’s get down and battle already!
I’m waiting on [0104,0003,0000]!
HGSS.666.0012:
I’m checking out [0100,000A,0000]’s moves
and devising some strategies.\f
When I come up with a good one,
let’s battle!\f
All right. Later!
